allow:
Bash(curl -s "https://population.un.org/dataportalapi/swagger/DataPortalOpenAPISpecificationv1.0/swagger.json" -o /tmp/unwpp/swagger-v1.json 2>&1 && python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/tmp/unwpp/swagger-v1.json'\) as f:
    spec = json.load\(f\)
# Print all paths and their parameters
for path, methods in spec.get\('paths', {}\).items\(\):
    for method, details in methods.items\(\):
        if method in \('get','post','put','delete'\):
            params = details.get\('parameters', []\)
            param_names = [p['name'] for p in params]
            print\(f'{method.upper\(\)} {path}'\)
            print\(f'  params: {param_names}'\)
            print\(\)
" 2>&1)
